/usr/bin/c++ -Wall  -Wsuggest-override -Werror=vla -pthread -Wshadow -O3 -DNDEBUG -s -rdynamic CMakeFiles/kicad2step.dir/kicad2step.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad2step.dir/pcb/3d_resolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad2step.dir/pcb/base.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad2step.dir/pcb/kicadmodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad2step.dir/pcb/kicadmodule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad2step.dir/pcb/kicadpad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad2step.dir/pcb/kicadpcb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad2step.dir/pcb/kicadcurve.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad2step.dir/pcb/oce_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad2step.dir/sexpr/sexpr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kicad2step.dir/sexpr/sexpr_parser.cpp.o -o kicad2step  -pthread -lwx_gtk3u_gl-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_aui-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_html-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_core-3.2 -lwx_baseu_net-3.2 -lwx_baseu-3.2 -lwx_baseu_xml-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_stc-3.2 -lTKBinL -lTKBin -lTKBinTObj -lTKBinXCAF -lTKBool -lTKBO -lTKBRep -lTKCAF -lTKCDF -lTKernel -lTKFeat -lTKFillet -lTKG2d -lTKG3d -lTKGeomAlgo -lTKGeomBase -lTKHLR -lTKIGES -lTKLCAF -lTKMath -lTKMesh -lTKMeshVS -lTKOffset -lTKOpenGl -lTKPrim -lTKService -lTKShHealing -lTKSTEP209 -lTKSTEPAttr -lTKSTEPBase -lTKSTEP -lTKSTL -lTKTObj -lTKTopAlgo -lTKV3d -lTKVRML -lTKXCAF -lTKXDEIGES -lTKXDESTEP -lTKXMesh -lTKXmlL -lTKXml -lTKXmlTObj -lTKXmlXCAF -lTKXSBase
